prompt: Create a Pixar-style 3D animated cinematic still on a 16:9 widescreen canvas, set on an old urban rooftop at blue-hour dusk with a glowing city skyline in the background. In the center foreground stand two stylized construction or repair workers with friendly proportions: a young man on the left with short tousled brown hair, a cream rolled-sleeve work shirt, tan work pants, brown work boots, a belt, and a leather tool bag in his left hand; a young woman on the right with long auburn hair, a light blue denim work shirt, fitted blue jeans with rolled cuffs, brown work boots, a utility belt with tools, and a large rolled blueprint held diagonally across her chest. Pose them close together as if discussing a rooftop renovation, facing the viewer with relaxed confident body language. The rooftop should include exactly 5 notable prop groups: one weathered concrete utility wall with vents and pipes on the left, two potted plants near the left wall, one low brick parapet across the back, one rooftop water tower on a building to the right, and one large potted plant with broad leaves on the far right. Add wet reflective patches, scattered small debris, vents, pipes, and warm window lights. The skyline should feel like a whimsical New York-inspired metropolis with art deco skyscrapers, antennas, and softly lit windows. Use high-quality Pixar-like 3D rendering, soft rounded character shapes, cinematic depth of field, warm rim lighting, teal-blue evening sky, subtle volumetric haze, glossy puddle reflections, and a polished family-animation look. No text, no logos, no watermark.
